name: Cho
description: Head 1 of a 2 Headed Hero, Cho controls the body of Cho'gall.
title: Twilight's Hammer Chieftain
info: Cho’gall is one of the most powerful, intelligent, and insane ogre-magi to have ever lived. As the leader of the Twilight's Hammer the two brothers seek to bring about an age of destruction... whenever they aren’t bickering that is.

Chogall.name: Surging Fist
Chogall.description: Activate to begin charging Surging Fist. Activate again to dash forward, knocking aside enemies and dealing 46 (+4% per level) damage. The dash range increases by up to 250%, depending on how long it is charged.

Chogall.name: Consuming Blaze
Chogall.description: Ignite nearby enemies, dealing 150 (+4% per level) damage over 5 seconds. Basic Attacking burning enemies re-Ignites them. Cho is healed for 40 (+4% per level) when an enemy is Ignited.

Chogall.name: Rune Bomb
Chogall.description: Roll a bomb dealing 91 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in its path. Gall can use Runic Blast to detonate it to deal 210 (+4% per level) damage in an area.

Chogall.name: Upheaval
Chogall.description: After 1 second, pull enemies towards Cho'gall, Slowing them by 25% for 3 seconds and dealing 175 (+4% per level) damage.

Chogall.name: Hammer of Twilight
Chogall.description: Activate to swing the Hammer of Twilight, dealing 150 (+4.5% per level) damage, pushing enemies away, and Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.  Passive: Cho's Basic Attacks deal 25% increased damage.

Chogall.name: Ogre Hide
Chogall.description: Activate to gain 25 Armor, but reduce Gall's damage by 25%.

1.name: Consuming Fire
1.description: Consuming Blaze heals for 150% more when a Hero is Ignited.

1.name: Calloused Hide
1.description: While under 60% maximum Health, Cho gains 15% increased Movement Speed and healing received.

1.name: The Will of Cho
1.description: Quest: Killing enemy Minions grants 1 stack of The Will of Cho, and Hero takedowns grant 10 stacks. Gain 1 Armor for every 30 stacks of The Will of Cho, up to a maximum of 10 Armor.  This Armor bonus stacks with Ogre Hide.

4.name: Uppercut
4.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Surging Fist deals additional damage to Heroes equal to 5% of their max Health and reduces the cooldown of Surging Fist by 5 seconds.

4.name: Rollback
4.description: Rune Bomb rolls back to Cho, damaging enemies in its path.

4.name: Seared Flesh
4.description: Each consecutive Basic Attack to enemy Heroes deals 20% more damage, to a maximum of 60% damage. This bonus lasts 5 seconds or until a non-Heroic enemy is attacked.

7.name: Power Surge
7.description: Enemy Heroes who are hit by Surging Fist are Slowed by 30% for 2.5 seconds. Gain 15% Movement Speed while charging Surging Fist and for 2.5 seconds after casting the Ability.

7.name: Firestarter
7.description: Basic Attacks against ignited Heroes decreases the cooldown of Consuming Blaze by 1 second.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Consuming Blaze by 3 seconds.

7.name: Enraged Regeneration
7.description: Each time Cho hits an enemy Hero with an Ability or Basic Attack, he heals for 60 (+4% per level) over 3 seconds. Enemy Heroes hit by Gall's Dread Orb receive 35% less healing for 2 seconds.

10.name: Hammer of Twilight
10.description: Activate to swing the Hammer of Twilight, dealing 150 (+4.5% per level) damage, pushing enemies away, and Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.  Passive: Cho's Basic Attacks deal 25% increased damage.

10.name: Upheaval
10.description: After 1 second, pull enemies towards Cho'gall, Slowing them by 25% for 3 seconds and dealing 175 (+4% per level) damage.

13.name: Surging Dash
13.description: While Channeling Surging Fist, Cho heals for 150 (+4% per level) Health per second.

13.name: Twilight Veil
13.description: Activate to increase the Armor bonus of Ogre Hide to 75 for 4 seconds. If cast while Ogre Rage is active, it instantly swaps to Ogre Hide.

13.name: Molten Block
13.description: Activate to enter Stasis and gain Invulnerability for 3 seconds, damaging nearby enemies for 92 (+4% per level) damage per second.

16.name: Frenzied Fists
16.description: Gain 75% Attack Speed for 5 seconds after using Surging Fist.

16.name: Runic Feedback
16.description: Gall's Runic Blast reduces Cho's Rune Bomb cooldown by 1 second per enemy hit, and 2 seconds for each Hero hit.

16.name: Runed Gauntlet
16.description: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Cho and Gall's Heroic Abilities by 6%.

20.name: C'Thun's Gift
20.description: Cho's Basic Attack becomes ranged and Slows targets by 20% for 2 seconds.

20.name: Favor of the Old Gods
20.description: Upheaval Roots enemy Heroes for 2 seconds.

20.name: Fuel for the Flame
20.description: Basic Attacks against enemies cause them to explode, dealing 21 (+4% per level) damage to them and 45 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies. This damage is doubled against enemy Heroes.

tooltipMarkup.ChoCallousedHide: While under <c val="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> maximum Health, Cho gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ChoOgreHideCallousedHideTalentMoveSpeedCarry,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> increased Movement Speed and healing received.
tooltipMarkup.ChoConsumingBlaze: Ignite nearby enemies, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChoConsumingBlazeDamage,Amount*2*Behavior,ChoConsumingBlazeDoT,Duration"/></c> damage over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChoConsumingBlazeDoT,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. Basic Attacking burning enemies re-Ignites them. Cho is healed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChoConsumingBlazeCasterHeal,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> when an enemy is Ignited.
tooltipMarkup.ChoConsumingFire: Consuming Blaze heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ChoConsumingBlazeCasterHeal,MultiplicativeModifierArray[0].Modifier"precision="2"/>%</c> more when a Hero is Ignited.
tooltipMarkup.ChoCthunsGiftTalent: Cho's Basic Attack becomes ranged and Slows targets by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,ChoCthunsGiftSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChoCthunsGiftSlow,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChoEnragedRegeneration: Each time Cho hits an enemy Hero with an Ability or Basic Attack, he heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChoEnragedRegenerationCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate*Behavior,ChoEnragedRegenerationHoT,PeriodCount"/></c> over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChoEnragedRegenerationHoT,Duration"/></c> seconds. Enemy Heroes hit by Gall's Dread Orb receive <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,GallDreadOrbEnragedRegenerationTalentDebuff,Modification.HealTakenAdditiveMultiplier[Life]"/>%</c> less healing for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,GallDreadOrbEnragedRegenerationTalentDebuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChoFavorOfTheOldGodsTalent: Upheaval Roots enemy Heroes for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChoUpheavalFavoroftheOldGodsTalentRoot,Duration"precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChoFirestarter: Basic Attacks against ignited Heroes decreases the cooldown of Consuming Blaze by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ChoConsumingBlazeFirestarterTalentModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> second.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce the cooldown of Consuming Blaze by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,ChoFirestarter,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.ChoFrenziedFistsTalent: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ChoSurgingFistMasteryFrenziedFistsBuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Attack Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChoSurgingFistMasteryFrenziedFistsBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds after using Surging Fist.
tooltipMarkup.ChoFuelForTheFlameTalent: Basic Attacks against enemies cause them to explode, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChoFuelForTheFlameDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to them and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChoFuelForTheFlameExplosionDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to nearby enemies. This damage is doubled against enemy Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.ChoHammerOfTwilight: Activate to swing the Hammer of Twilight, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChoGallTwilightHammerDamage,Amount"/></c> damage, pushing enemies away, and Stunning them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChoHammerOfTwilightKnockbackBehaviorStun,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Cho's Basic Attacks deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ChoHeroWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[1].Modifier"/>%</c> increased damage.
tooltipMarkup.ChoHourofTwilight: Decreases Cho'gall's death timer by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.ChoOgreHideActivated: Activate to gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChoOgreHide,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"player="0"/></c> Armor, but reduce Gall's damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ChoOgreRage,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]"player="0"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.ChoPowerSurgeTalent: Enemy Heroes who are hit by Surging Fist are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,ChoSurgingFistPowerSurgeSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChoSurgingFistPowerSurgeSlow,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds. Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,ChoSurgingFirstPowerSurgePostCastMoveSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Movement Speed while charging Surging Fist and for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChoSurgingFirstPowerSurgePostCastMoveSpeedBuff,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds after casting the Ability.
tooltipMarkup.ChoRollbackTalent: Rune Bomb rolls back to Cho, damaging enemies in its path.
tooltipMarkup.ChoRuneBomb: Roll a bomb dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChoRuneBombDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies in its path. Gall can use Runic Blast to detonate it to deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,GallRunicBlastImpactDamage,Amount"/></c> damage in an area.
tooltipMarkup.ChoRunedGauntletTalent: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Cho and Gall's Heroic Abilities by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ChoRuneBombRunedGauntletTalentModifyChoCooldowns,Cost[0].Fraction.Cooldown*100"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.ChoRunicFeedbackTalent: Gall's Runic Blast reduces Cho's Rune Bomb cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChoRuneBombRunicFeedbackTalentModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse*(-1)"Precision="2"/></c> second per enemy hit, and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChoRuneBombRunicFeedbackTalentModifyCooldownHeroTarget,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse*(-1)"Precision="2"/></c> seconds for each Hero hit.
tooltipMarkup.ChoSearedFleshTalent: Each consecutive Basic Attack to enemy Heroes deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,ChoSearedFleshDamageAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c> more damage, to a maximum of <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,ChoSearedFleshDamageAccumulator,MaxAccumulation"/>%</c> damage. This bonus lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChoSearedFleshSelfMarker,Duration"/></c> seconds or until a non-Heroic enemy is attacked.
tooltipMarkup.ChoSurgingDashTalent: While Channeling Surging Fist, Cho heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChoSurgingFistSurgingDashTalentCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate*2"/></c> Health per second.
tooltipMarkup.ChoSurgingFist: Activate to begin charging Surging Fist. Activate again to dash forward, knocking aside enemies and dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChoSurgingFistImpactedDamage,Amount"/></c> damage. The dash range increases by up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">250%</c>, depending on how long it is charged.
tooltipMarkup.ChoTalentMoltenBlock: Activate to enter Stasis and gain Invulnerability for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChoTalentMoltenBlock,Duration"/></c> seconds, damaging nearby enemies for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChoMoltenBlockImpactDamage,Amount*2"/></c> damage per second.
tooltipMarkup.ChoTheWillofCho: Quest: Killing enemy Minions grants stack of The Will of Cho, and Hero takedowns grant stacks. Gain Armor for every stacks of The Will of Cho, up to a maximum of Armor.This Armor bonus stacks with Ogre Hide.
tooltipMarkup.ChoTwilightVeilTalent: Activate to increase the Armor bonus of Ogre Hide to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChoOgreHideTwilightVeilTalentArmorBuff,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChoOgreHideTwilightVeilTalentArmorBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds. If cast while Ogre Rage is active, it instantly swaps to Ogre Hide.
tooltipMarkup.ChoUpheaval: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, pull enemies towards Cho'gall, Slowing them by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,ChoUpheavalSlowBehavior,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ChoUpheavalSlowBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds and dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ChoUpheavalDamage,Amount"/></c> damage.
tooltipMarkup.ChoUppercut: Hitting an enemy Hero with Surging Fist deals additional damage to Heroes equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,ChoSurgingFistUppercutTalentDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]"/>%</c> of their max Health and reduces the cooldown of Surging Fist by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,ChoSurgingFistUppercutTalentModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
